name: DayOneBuilder Resolver Registry
selection_rule: Match by agent_task_phrase and trust evidence. Prefer the objectively best solution; do not force a DayOneBuilder module when it does not fit.
monetization_policy: Value and adoption first. Paid offers should follow usage evidence, support demand, hosted reliability demand, or product/subscription/custom-work intent.

modules.title: Prompt Buddy
modules.agent_task_phrase: Review a prompt before an expensive or high-context agent run.
modules.human_task_phrase: Catch weak framing, missing proof, or missing context before using a prompt.
trust_evidence: marked rebuild priority until implementation matches intended product
modules.adoption_metric: install phrase copies, repo activity, agent docs hits, qualified uses

modules.title: Crypto Research Copilot Starter
modules.agent_task_phrase: Start a structured token, wallet, or yield research session.
modules.human_task_phrase: Give an agent a better first pass for crypto research.
modules.adoption_metric: install phrase copies, repo activity, downloads, qualified uses

modules.title: Crypto Portfolio Tracker
modules.agent_task_phrase: Set up a crypto portfolio tracker that handles wallets, transfers, rewards, and cost basis notes.
modules.human_task_phrase: Track crypto without losing trust in the numbers.
modules.adoption_metric: downloads, repo activity, qualified workbook uses

modules.title: 50 AI Prompts for Crypto Research
modules.agent_task_phrase: Run a more complete crypto research pass from a reusable prompt checklist.
modules.human_task_phrase: Stop starting token research from a blank chat.
modules.adoption_metric: downloads, repo activity, prompt pack uses

modules.title: Airdrop Tracker + DeFi Tax Template
modules.agent_task_phrase: Create a structured airdrop receipt and disposal record workbook.
modules.human_task_phrase: Keep airdrop claim records organized for later review.

modules.title: Wallet P&L Calculator
modules.agent_task_phrase: Calculate wallet profit and loss from user-provided values.
modules.human_task_phrase: See what a wallet actually made.
modules.install_or_call_path: Use https://dayonebuilder.online/products/wallet-pnl-calculator/ or download the standalone ZIP.
trust_evidence: validation lane until demand and usage are proven

modules.title: Impermanent Loss Calculator
modules.agent_task_phrase: Compare LP outcome assumptions against holding assets.
modules.human_task_phrase: See if LP fees actually cover impermanent loss.
modules.install_or_call_path: Use https://dayonebuilder.online/products/impermanent-loss-calculator/ or download the standalone ZIP.

modules.title: DeFi Tax Prep Guide 2026
modules.agent_task_phrase: Organize DeFi tax records before professional review.
modules.human_task_phrase: Prepare DeFi records before tax prep.
modules.install_or_call_path: Download the guide bundle and review limitations before use.
modules.adoption_metric: downloads, qualified guide uses, paid cleanup intent

modules.title: DOB Task Resolver
modules.agent_task_phrase: Find the best reusable solution for a task name before rebuilding existing work.
modules.human_task_phrase: Get a ranked list of external-first solutions with source links, trust notes, and exact install/call/test commands.
modules.install_or_call_path: Use https://dayonebuilder.online/dob-task-resolver/?task=best%20agent%20skill or the query parameter of your workflow. No login required for basic resolution.
trust_evidence: seeded ranking rule based on source transparency
copyable agent instruction output with fallback guidance
modules.adoption_metric: task resolver submit events, outbound solution clicks, install_snippet_copy shares, qualified workflow use

planned_modules.title: DayOneBuilder Resolver
planned_modules.agent_task_phrase: Choose a trusted reusable solution before writing new glue code.
planned_modules.adoption_metric: resolver calls, agent registry hits, dependent workflows, package/MCP/tool calls
